'''Soontir Fel's mother''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the mother of [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir]] and [[Todr Fel]].

==Biography==
Like [[Soontir Fel's father|her husband]], she worked for [[Allied Grain and Roughage]], who owned a local [[agro-combine]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], where the family lived.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
